actions.caption: 客户编号_ButtonEdit
actions.expression:
SELECT kh.sid,
       kh.kh_id,
       kh.company_name,
       kh.dlmc,
       kh.fkys,
       khttxx.ttdm,
       khttxx.cdmc,
       khttxx.kzh,
       khttxx.ttr,
       khttxx.shr,
       khttxx.tzr,
       khttxx.xbkrtt
FROM kh,khttxx 
WHERE (kh.sid=khttxx.pid)

actions.name: 调入海关编号
actions.caption: 调入海关编号

fields.caption: 海关编号
fields.output: 商检清单.海关编号

actions.expression:
SELECT wfgs.sid,wfgs.hgbh 
FROM wfgs 
WHERE (wfgs.wfgs=[商检清单.我方公司]) 
ORDER BY wfgs.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.name: 调入业务部门
actions.caption: 调入业务部门

fields.caption: 部    门

actions.expression:
SELECT ywrybiao.sid,ywrybiao.bm 
FROM ywrybiao 
WHERE (ywrybiao.yhm=[商检清单.业务人员]) 
ORDER BY ywrybiao.sid DESC LIMIT 1

actions.expression:
select bz 
from bgdjjs 
where (ssgs=[商检清单.所属公司]) 
and (bz<>"") 
and (bz is not null)
limit 1

actions.expression:
SELECT hgbmbsheet.sid,
       hgbmbsheet.hgbm,
       hgbmbsheet.tsl,
       hgbmbsheet.zzsl,
       hgbmbsheet.hwmc,
       hgbmbsheet.cznr,
       hgbmbsheet.dw,
       hgbmbsheet.ywpm
FROM hgbmbsheet 
WHERE (hgbmbsheet.sfpz="是") 
ORDER BY hgbmbsheet.sid ASC

actions.name: 计算-报关总价
actions.caption: 计算-报关总价
actions.expression: [商检清单.报关汇率]*[商检清单.合并产品.采购总价]
actions.output: 商检清单.合并产品.报关总价

actions.name: 计算-装 箱 率
actions.caption: 计算-装 箱 率
actions.expression: [商检清单.合并产品.出货数量]/[商检清单.合并产品.箱    数]
actions.output: 商检清单.合并产品.装 箱 率

actions.name: 计算-采购单价
actions.caption: 计算-采购单价
actions.expression: [商检清单.合并产品.采购总价]/[商检清单.合并产品.出货数量]
actions.output: 商检清单.合并产品.采购单价

actions.name: 计算-毛    重
actions.caption: 计算-毛    重
actions.expression: [商检清单.合并产品.总 毛 重]/[商检清单.合并产品.箱    数]
actions.output: 商检清单.合并产品.毛    重

actions.name: 计算-净    重
actions.caption: 计算-净    重
actions.expression: [商检清单.合并产品.总 净 重]/[商检清单.合并产品.箱    数]

actions.name: 计算-外箱体积
actions.caption: 计算-外箱体积

actions.name: 计算-外销单价

actions.name: 计算-总 净 重

actions.expression:
select
    kh.kh_id,
    kh.ssgs,
    kh.khjc,
    kh.dlmc,
    kh.country,
    kh.mdka,
    kh.ywry,
    kh.wfgs,
    kh.xybx,
    kh.RMBkh,
    kh.qzgx,
    kh.ttr,
    kh.shr,
    kh.tzr
from kh
where kh.company_name=[商检清单.客户名称]
actions.caption: 事_客户资料

actions.expression:
select
    hgbmbsheet.hgbm,
    hgbmbsheet.tsl,
    hgbmbsheet.zzsl,
    hgbmbsheet.hwmc,
    hgbmbsheet.ywpm,
    hgbmbsheet.dw,
    hgbmbsheet.cznr,
    hgbmbsheet.sfsj,
    hgbmbsheet.sb
from hgbmbsheet
where hgbmbsheet.hwmc=[商检清单.合并产品.中文品名]
and  (hgbmbsheet.sfpz="是") 
ORDER BY hgbmbsheet.sid ASC
actions.caption: 事_海关编码信息

from jldw
where jldw.ywmc=[商检清单.合并产品.海关计量单位]

actions.expression:
select   wfgsbghl.bghl
from wfgs ,wfgsbghl
where wfgs.rid=wfgsbghl.pid
and wfgsbghl.hbdm=[商检清单.货币代码]
and  wfgs.wfgs=[商检清单.我方公司]
actions.caption: 事_我发公司_报关汇率

view.params:
SELECT DISTINCT(khsheet3.company_name)
FROM khsheet3
WHERE   (khsheet3.module1="客户资料")

SELECT mygb.mygb
FROM mygb
ORDER BY mygb.SID ASC

SELECT DISTINCT(mygb.zwmc)
FROM mygb
ORDER BY mygb.zwmc ASC

SELECT wfgs.wfgs
FROM wfgs
ORDER BY wfgs.SID ASC

SELECT hbdm.hbdm
FROM hbdm
ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC

SELECT ysfs.ysfs,ysfs.SID
FROM ysfs
ORDER BY ysfs.SID ASC

SELECT cyka.ywmc,cyka.SID
FROM cyka
ORDER BY cyka.SID ASC

select mdka from mdka 
  where (ssgj=[商检清单.贸易国别])

宁波龙和
宁波志恒
义乌仓库

SELECT cdzl.cdmc
FROM cdzl
WHERE  permission('船代资料')
ORDER BY cdzl.SID ASC

SELECT DISTINCT(bgdjjs.ssgs)
FROM bgdjjs
ORDER BY bgdjjs.ssgs ASC

SELECT mdka.mdka
FROM mdka
ORDER BY mdka.SID ASC

SELECT hbdm.hhl
FROM hbdm
ORDER BY hbdm.SID ASC
limit 1

SELECT bzdw.dwdm
FROM bzdw
ORDER BY bzdw.sid ASC

高级认证企业
一般认证企业
一般信用企业
其他

SELECT yfzffsbiao.zffs
FROM yfzffsbiao
ORDER BY yfzffsbiao.SID ASC

SELECT wfgs.wfgs
FROM wfgs
ORDER BY wfgs.SID ASC

SELECT DISTINCT(mygb.dqzw)
FROM mygb
ORDER BY mygb.dqzw ASC

select
  jldw.dwdm 
from jldw
order  by jldw.dwdm

SELECT distinct(hgbmbsheet.hwmc)
FROM hgbmbsheet
WHERE (hgbmbsheet.sfpz="是")
ORDER BY hgbmbsheet.hwmc ASC

宁波
义乌
汕头
